holdings.name: Pidilite Industries
holdings.description: Fevicol, M-Seal, Dr. Fixit — India's dominant adhesive and sealant brand. Construction chemicals growing 20%+ with affordable housing boom. 60%+ gross margins from branded consumer adhesives. DIY and professional products both expanding.

holdings.name: SRF Limited
holdings.description: India's #1 fluorochemicals company and global refrigerant gas (R22, R134a) producer. Technical textiles (tyre cord, polyester, nylon) for Bridgestone, Michelin. New fluoropolymers for EV, aerospace and semiconductor applications. CapEx cycle 2022-26.

holdings.name: Deepak Nitrite
holdings.description: Midstream specialty chemicals — nitro-aromatic compounds used in dyes, agrochemicals, rubber chemicals and pharma intermediates. Deepak Phenolics (Dahej) makes phenol and acetone domestically for the first time, replacing Chinese imports.

holdings.name: Navin Fluorine International
holdings.description: CDMO for fluorinated APIs, agro-intermediates and specialty fluorochemicals. Protected mode high-value CRAMS business growing for global innovators. Per PFAS regulations in Europe boosting demand for fluorine-free alternatives NAFL develops.

holdings.name: Aarti Industries
holdings.description: India's largest benzene-based chemical company. Sulfuric acid, nitro-chloro-benzene, nitro-toluene — 100+ specialty chemicals used in dyes, pharma and agrochemicals. China+1 beneficiary as global buyers diversify sourcing from Indian manufacturers.

holdings.name: Gujarat Fluorochemicals
holdings.description: Transitioning from refrigerants to PTFE and other fluoropolymers for EV batteries, semiconductor fabrication and aerospace. India's only PTFE producer + India's first HFO (new-generation low-GWP refrigerant) maker. R&D-intensive expansion.
